task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 15-6-025 Measure media n-1 diff step error [Special Tests]

desc.p: Measure media n-1 diff step error

section.title: Function
section.p: This test measures and displays diff step error in [um].
The diff step error is an important key figure for the registration and print quality.
Also the different figures like rotation, translation and non-linear error values is calculated and displayed.

li.p: The media must be smooth, white and opaque.
Media width must be 50 inch or wider to have optimal results.

section.title: Description
section.p: The test is based on 2 main sections:

li.p: 40 cm section: nozzles which are used for accurate measurement are being qualified.
60 cm black bars section: the markers over the width are being measured.

section.p: Based on the marker positions read between the black bars, the different output criteria is calculated.
Goal of the test to have some guidance to act on the given values.
How to act on specific values and which values are within or out of specification: to be defined.
